description: Side-scrolling Mario-style platformer — pixel plumber jumps on enemies, collects coins, navigates platforms with gravity + collision. Canvas rendering, Press Start 2P retro font, RAF loop, localStorage high score and level progress.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/plumber (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Working gravity + AABB platform collision + enemy stomp logic. Canvas-rendered with sprite-style pixel art via filled rectangles (no external image assets, so no broken-asset risk). Preserve the platforms[] + entities[] data structure when modifying.
